title: J2CL selected-wave attachments hydrate metadata
summary: Selected-wave attachments in the J2CL read surface now hydrate server metadata after the initial render so read-only waves can expose real preview, open, and download actions.

items: J2CL selected-wave attachment placeholders now resolve to hydrated attachment models, preserve resolved metadata across unchanged viewport fragment merges, and avoid losing later attachments when self-closing image tags appear before normal image tags.
